    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import os\n",
        "\n",
        "for root, dirs, files in os.walk(\"/content\"):\n",
        "    for name in files:\n",

        "            print(os.path.join(root, name))\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "hEkbmftLSRNd"

      "execution_count": null,

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import os\n",
        "\n",
        "file_path = os.path.join(os.environ['HOME'], \"/content/{HOME}/datasets/BAL-SET-1/data.yaml\")\n",
        "print(\"Exists:\", os.path.exists(file_path))\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "QfIJ55sVQ2U8",
        "outputId": "7f881b08-6775-4a5d-bc2d-8214d9cd3375",
        "colab": {

            "Exists: False\n"
          ]

      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import yaml\n",
        "import os\n",
        "\n",
        "# Define the dataset location\n",
        "dataset_location = '/content/{HOME}/datasets/BAL-SET-1'  # Or your desired location\n",
        "\n",
        "with open(os.path.join(dataset_location, 'data.yaml'), 'r') as f:\n",
        "    data = yaml.safe_load(f)\n",
        "data['train'] = '/content/{HOME}/datasets/BAL-SET-1/train/images'\n",
        "data['val'] = '/content/{HOME}/datasets/BAL-SET-1/valid/images'\n",
        "data['test'] = '/content/{HOME}/datasets/BAL-SET-1/test/images'\n",
        "if 'path' in data:\n",
        "  del data['path']\n",
        "with open(os.path.join(dataset_location, 'data.yaml'), 'w') as f:\n",
        "    yaml.dump(data, f, sort_keys=False)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "Es7VJRgDOdw7"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "%cd {HOME}\n",
        "!yolo task=detect mode=predict model=yolov8n.pt conf=0.25 source='https://media.roboflow.com/notebooks/examples/dog.jpeg' save=True"
